commit_scope: Promote high-traffic dynamic read families into the BML native front door: presence places, graph node edges, and agent task logs.

local_validation.notes: The BML route catalog now exports 55 GET/read ingress-covered routes and the runtime-surface report shows 95 kernel-first capable/served routes. The Go kernel selection test passed in 37.432s and proves the new dynamic routes choose native-kernel-go, including the higher-priority /api/agent/tasks/{task_id}/log route over the existing task_* wildcard. The web_api goal measurement after the task-log batch reported goal_native_share=0.9725, goal_native_events=1945, total_events=2000, next_action=observe-next-route-window, and native_route_sources={bml_routes:62, form_manifest_routes:34}. The Rust checker still reports the same 14 pre-existing unresolved names observed on origin/main, with no new unresolved symbols from this batch.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR creation, hosted checks, merge, and post-merge deploy verification.

deploy_validation.notes: This branch has not yet been deployed. Hostinger deploy canaries now include the new presence places and graph node edges probes; agent task logs are covered by ingress and kernel route-selection proof because successful public probing needs a live task id.

phase_gate.reason: Local route promotion proof passed; CI, merge, and production deploy verification remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: GET /api/presences/{presence_id}/places, GET /api/graph/nodes/{node_id}/edges, and GET /api/agent/tasks/{task_id}/log should be selected by the BML native front door with X-Form-Python-Authority:false while preserving existing Python-compatible JSON shapes and 404 behavior.
e2e_validation.proof: Static ingress coverage, runtime-surface accounting, and Go kernel route selection all recognize the promoted dynamic routes. The traffic goal window now exceeds the 90% target at 97.25% native-executable web_api events.
test_flows: scripts/test_hostinger_deploy_form_paths.sh fails if any BML GET route lacks Traefik ingress or if the promoted handlers lose native proof headers.
api/tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py pins the new dynamic routes in the capable surface.
form/form-kernel-go/server_test.go compiles deploy/front-door/api.bml and verifies native route selection for presence places, graph node edges, and agent task logs.
scripts/native_route_goal_loop.py /goal --source web_api --seconds 86400 --limit 2000 reports next_action=observe-next-route-window while the window remains above 90% native-executable.

evidence_refs: bash scripts/test_hostinger_deploy_form_paths.sh -> BML GET/read ingress coverage: 55 routes; PASS.
cd form/form-kernel-go && go test ./... -run TestKernelReadRoutePromotionsSelectNatively -count=1 -> ok form-kernel-go 37.432s.
cd form/form-kernel-rust && ./target/release/form-kernel-rust check --routes ../../deploy/front-door/api.bml --stdlib ../form-stdlib -> same 14 pre-existing unresolved names as origin/main baseline.
